name: PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk
summary: PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk provides commercial banking products and services in Indonesia. Its products include savings and current accounts, time deposits, and certificates of deposit. The company also provides auto and home loans; investment and bancassurance products; e-banking services; safe box, payroll, and payment services; and clearing, LLG and RTGS, and foreign exchange transaction services. As of December 31, 2019, it had a network of 39 branches, 91 supporting branches, 83 functional offices, and 3 cash offices, as well as 143 automatic teller machines. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
